fieldlink_rosetta.description: Translation layer between geometry, form, and meaning—shapes as language

fieldlink_geometric_to_binary.description: Source of .claims and .obs formats, sensor primitives, solver registry, and bridge contract validation. The consortium adopts these schemas rather than duplicating them.

fieldlink_thermodynamic_accountability.description: Energy Accountant, Narrative Stripper (= coating detection, formalized), friction-ratio scoring, organism-agnostic accountability. The consortium uses this as its primary accountability layer; humans and AI are scored on the same physics-based axis.

fieldlink_ai_arena.description: Cherry-picked: LOGOS bounded-claim grammar and oracle-grounding pattern only. The adversarial trust-decay-via-cannibalization mechanic is intentionally NOT imported — the consortium is peers, not arena.

fieldlink_symbolic_defense.description: Six external manipulation tactics (social engineering, repetition pressure, framing/leading bias, authority/urgency, consensus pressure, flattery/guilt) with glyph-defense responses. physics/SUBSTRATE_VIOLATION_DETECTION.md + physics/defense_tactic_map.json source the taxonomy verbatim and add the conservation-law signature for each.

fieldlink_physicsguard.description: Translates natural-language claims into physical constraint equations and checks them against conservation laws (1st Law, 2nd Law, mass conservation). Verdicts: CLEAN / SUSPECT / CORRUPTED. physics/SUBSTRATE_VIOLATION_DETECTION.md borrows the framing of mapping each manipulation tactic onto a conservation-law breach class.
